calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Plaintiff: Brinda Faye Drummer, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Angela Williams.
Exhibit #1 - Rental Agreement------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit #2 - Threeday Notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Angela Williams as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 140 Jules Ave., Upstairs Unit, San Francisco, CA. 94112.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $3,033.13
No Attorney's Fees.
No Costs.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, APR-27-2006: PLAINTIFF BRINDA FAYE DRUMMER APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DAY; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT ANGELA WILLIAMS THIS DATE.

MATTER IS ORDERED OFF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR; D-206 TRIAL DATE OF MAY-01-2006 REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218).
